title: OMEGA Capability Contract
description: Distributed-Governor capability contract. Superset of the Execution Reality Engine capability contract, adding the seven fields MISSION OMEGA mandates (owner, purpose, entry_point, expected_artifact, freshness_requirement, success_criteria, automated_verification). A capability is healthy ONLY when its intended artifact is produced correctly and on time. Empirical thresholds stay null (UNKNOWN) until observed on the Windows environment.

owner.description: Which governor is accountable for this capability's health.

purpose.description: Why this capability exists, in one sentence.

entry_point.description: How the capability is invoked/where its work originates. Paths/commands are declared but not executed by Cloud Governor (READ-ONLY default).

reference.description: e.g. 'C:\vajra\collectors\run.py' or a job name. Verbatim; never inferred.

description.description: The concrete output that proves the capability works.

location.description: Where the artifact lands; null = UNKNOWN until observed.

max_staleness_seconds.description: null = UNKNOWN, calibrated from observed cadence. Never guessed.

session_aware.description: If true, freshness only evaluated during active market sessions.

success_criteria.description: Objective, checkable statements that together define 'working correctly'.

checks.description: Named checks (may reference Execution Reality Engine SPEC-05 rule ids).

runs_on.description: Verification must run where the evidence is; cloud verifies bridged evidence, windows verifies local artifacts.

status.description: Verified status. 'unknown' = not yet observed; 'absent' = observed-absent.

status_evidence.description: Evidence-bundle id / artifact citation. Required to claim 'healthy' (no unsupported readiness).
